arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the ECS service.

availability_zone_rebalancing.description: Indicates whether availability zone rebalancing is enabled for the ECS service.

desired_count.description: The desired number of tasks to run in the service.

id.description: The unique identifier of the ECS service.

launch_type.description: The type of launch for tasks in the service, such as EC2 or Fargate.

scheduling_strategy.description: The strategy used for task placement in the ECS service, like REPLICA or DAEMON.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the ECS service.

task_definition.description: The task definition used by the ECS service.
